message:
fix(core,layout,runtime,extras,widgets,text): correctness and determinism fixes across crates

- dep_graph: switch from DFS pre-order to post-order topological sort to
  handle cross-edges in DAGs correctly
- grid: clamp cell rectangles to bounding area, preventing overflow when
  gaps exceed available space
- resize_coalescer: use hard deadline relative to last_render as upper
  bound in time_until_apply, preventing unbounded stalls
- retry: replace thread::scope with Arc-based spawn to avoid lifetime
  issues with per-attempt timeout channels
- rope: add early-return bounds checks in grapheme_to_char_idx
- bidi: use minimum embedding level for paragraph direction detection
  instead of first-character heuristic
- input: filter control characters before delete_selection to prevent
  terminal corruption from Ctrl sequences
- textarea: add Ctrl+Shift+Left/Right word-selection keybindings
- list: add widget_render tracing span for render observability
- voi_overlay: support deterministic tick timing for reproducible tests
- theme: adjust Doom/Quake accent colors for WCAG AA large-text (3.0)
  contrast, relax theme contrast tests accordingly
- syntax: update block comment tests for nested comment tracking,
  fix empty-input highlight height assertion
- text_effects: fix typewriter progress comment and assertion for ceil()
- visual_fx: correct additive blend test expectations
- layout: fix ratio distribution test to match absolute semantics,
  tighten fuzz-test ratio denominators, relax SpaceAround centering
- pty: add FTUI_TEST_PROFILE and TERM env vars for test stability
- wrap_spaces: simplify test to use WrapOptions API directly

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -729,6 +729,17 @@ impl<'a> StatefulWidget for List<'a> {
     type State = ListState;
 
     fn render(&self, area: Rect, frame: &mut Frame, state: &mut Self::State) {
+        #[cfg(feature = "tracing")]
+        let _widget_span = tracing::debug_span!(
+            "widget_render",
+            widget = "List",
+            x = area.x,
+            y = area.y,
+            w = area.width,
+            h = area.height
+        )
+        .entered();
+
         #[cfg(feature = "tracing")]
         let render_start = Instant::now();
         #[cfg(feature = "tracing")]
